title: Charred Korean BBQ Bacon Banchan
description: A simple and flavorful side dish inspired by Korean BBQ, featuring crispy bacon and a sweet charred flavor.
instructions: 2. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil or parchment paper.
3. Lay the bacon slices on the prepared baking sheet.
4. Bake the bacon for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
5. Remove the bacon from the oven and let it cool completely.
6. In a small bowl, mix together the gochujang, soy sauce, rice vinegar, brown sugar, and charred Korean chili flakes.
7. Add the toasted sesame seeds and green onions to the bowl and stir to combine.
8. Once the bacon is cool, chop it into small pieces and add it to the bowl.
9. Stir to combine and adjust the seasoning as needed.
10. Serve the Charred Korean BBQ Bacon Banchan at room temperature or chilled.
11. Garnish with additional green onions and toasted sesame seeds, if desired.
